name: biav-sdk-workspace
description: npm workspace root for the Silver Core SDK family: Silver Core Agent SDK (silver-core-agent-sdk) + Silver Core Maestro SDK (silver-core-maestro-sdk). One-way dependency maestro -> agent, LOCKSTEP version clock — the two packages always carry the SAME version (keeper ruling 2026-07-18, overriding the §2 independent-clocks clause). silver-core-testbed is a CONSUMER, not a third family package: private, never published, lockstep-exempt, depends only on the two packages' public export surfaces, and no family package may import it. The rest of this repository (news/wiki/site/memory/...) is not part of the npm workspace.
